text: GPT-4o is incredibly fast and smart. The voice mode feels like talking to a real human. The future of AI interaction is here. #OpenAI #GPT4
NVIDIA Blackwell B200 is a monster. 20 petaflops of AI performance. The computing power we are seeing today is just mind-blowing. #NVIDIA #AI #Hardware
Just watched SpaceX Starship flight 4 landing successfully in both stages. The precision of the booster catch on the virtual tower is unbelievable. Humanity is going to Mars! #SpaceX #Starship
Tesla FSD v12.4 is a major leap forward. End-to-end neural networks are performing exceptionally well. Almost zero interventions on a 30-minute drive today. #Tesla #FSD
The energy transition is accelerating. Solar power plus battery storage is now the cheapest form of new electricity in many parts of the world. #Sustainability #Solar
PyTorch 2.3 has some great performance improvements for LLM training. The integration with Triton is getting better. Open-source AI tools are thriving. #MachineLearning #PyTorch
WebGPU is a game-changer for web-based graphics and machine learning. Running 3D environments and AI models directly in the browser is now extremely fast. #WebGPU #WebDev
Starlink has launched its mini dish! Extremely compact, fits in a backpack, and has a built-in router. This is going to revolutionize remote work and travel. #Starlink #Tech

Llama 3 is a massive win for the open-source community. The 8B and 70B models are punchy and highly competitive with proprietary models. Mark Zuckerberg is doing a huge service here. #Llama3 #OpenSource

The rapid progress of humanoid robots is breathtaking. Boston Dynamics Atlas went fully electric, and Tesla Optimus is learning to sort batteries autonomously. We are witnessing the dawn of robotics. #Robotics #AI
Nvidia is now briefly the most valuable company in the world. An incredible milestone for Jensen Huang and the entire team. Hardware powers the AI revolution. #NVIDIA #Tech
OpenAI's SearchGPT is super fast. Instant answers with clear citations and web links. It's an interesting approach to blending search with conversational AI. #SearchGPT #AI
Kubernetes 1.30 was released! It's called 'Uwubernetes' by some, but the new features like Structured Parameters for Dynamic Resource Allocation are very powerful. #Kubernetes #CloudNative
The Rust programming language continues to gain ground in Linux kernel development and systems programming. Safe memory management by default is a massive win for security. #RustLang #Linux
FastAPI is honestly one of the best python web frameworks ever created. The automatic docs, typing support, and raw speed make it a joy to use. #Python #FastAPI
Apple Intelligence was announced today. Deeply integrated with iOS 18 and macOS Sequoia, powered by on-device and private cloud models. Very thoughtful approach to privacy. #Apple #AppleIntelligence
The developer experience with Vercel and Next.js is second to none. Building and deploying high-performance React apps has never been this seamless. #NextJS #React
Hugging Face now hosts over 500,000 models! This hub has truly become the town square for machine learning. Congrats to the team on democratizing AI. #HuggingFace #AI
With the rise of local LLMs running via Ollama and Llama.cpp, developers can now run powerful models directly on their M3 Macbooks offline. Privacy and power in one. #LocalLLM #AI

DeepSeek-V2 has shaken the AI world. A massive Mixture-of-Experts model with extreme cost-efficiency and performance matching GPT-4-class models. Open source is moving incredibly fast in China. #DeepSeek #AI

Quantum computing is slowly moving out of the lab. IBM just unveiled its newest utility-scale quantum processor. Exciting times ahead for cryptographic and material science research. #QuantumComputing #Tech
TypeScript 5.4 is out! Better auto-imports, preserved template literal types, and new utility types. Life is too short to write vanilla JavaScript without static types. #TypeScript #WebDev

Docker revolutionized development, but Podman is an amazing alternative. Daemonless, rootless by default, and fully OCI compliant. Worth a try if you want to optimize your container environment. #Docker #Containers
Prometheus and Grafana remain the gold standard for cloud-native observability. If you aren't monitoring your systems with real-time metrics, you are flying blind. #DevOps #Observability
GitHub Copilot has saved me at least 5 hours of boilerplate coding this week alone. It's not a replacement for thinking, but it's the ultimate productivity multiplier. #GitHubCopilot #AI
PostgreSQL is absolute magic. A database that has stood the test of time, supports JSON, relational data, and with pgvector, handles vector search seamlessly. Simply incredible. #PostgreSQL #Database

The Apache Iceberg table format is winning the modern data stack battle. Seamless ACID transactions, schema evolution, and time travel over object storage. This is the future of data lakehouses. #DataLakehouse #ApacheIceberg
DuckDB is SQLite for analytics. Fast, serverless, and allows querying parquet files locally with pure SQL. Perfect for modern data pipelines and data science workflows. #DuckDB #SQL

Generative AI is shifting from text and images to music and video. Tools like Sora and Udio show that the creative landscape is going to transform faster than anyone anticipated. #Sora #Udio #GenerativeAI

Just completed my first end-to-end data pipeline on AWS using S3, Athena, and dbt. Cloud data engineering is extremely powerful but the configuration is where the real work is! #CloudComputing #AWS #DataEngineering
